login.verifySent: Account created. Please confirm your email address via the link we sent you.
login.verifyOk: Email confirmed. You can log in now.
login.verifyInvalid: Confirmation link invalid or already used.

setup.title: First-run setup
setup.intro: Welcome! How should sign-in work on this instance?
setup.choosePasswordHint: Local admin account, keeps working even if an SSO provider is down. OIDC can be added afterwards.
setup.chooseOidcHint: No local password, the first OIDC login automatically becomes admin.
setup.accountHint: This account becomes the instance admin.
setup.oidcHint: Optional: sign-in via an OIDC provider (SSO). Can be set up or changed later in settings.
setup.oidcReady: OIDC active, the first login automatically becomes admin.
setup.done: Setup complete, you are signed in as admin.
setup.closeRegistrationHint: Recommended for publicly reachable instances: stops strangers from creating accounts. Add new users afterwards via user management. With OIDC enabled, password registration is disabled anyway; new OIDC users are still provisioned automatically.

dash.title: DASHBOARD
dash.empty: No active downloads. Head to the <1>Browser</1> to sync.
dash.cancelAllConfirm: Cancel all active and queued downloads?

browser.title: BROWSER
browser.catalogLoading: Loading catalog, first-time AniList matching can take a while…
browser.confirmRematchAll: Re-search all automatic matches in this folder? Manual assignments are kept.
browser.searchHint: Title, AniList ID or anilist.co link
browser.indexBuilding: The index is still being built and improves over time.
browser.scopeInheritedHint: Mark comes from a parent folder.
browser.scopeClearHint: Delete this folder's own mark, the parent applies again.
browser.scopePick: No metadata source chosen for this folder yet. The choice is saved and applies to all subfolders.
browser.flatSync: Write files directly into the target (no subfolder) — e.g. for Title/Season 01/ layouts

watch.title: AUTO-SYNC
watch.templateHint: New files are renamed on download. Variables: {title} {season:02} {episode:02} {year} {group} {resolution} {dub} {sub}
watch.confirmDelete: Remove auto-sync for "{{name}}"? Downloaded files are kept.
watch.empty: Select a folder in the <1>Browser</1> and click "Watch".

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.watchInterval: Auto-sync check interval (minutes, applies to all)
settings.oidcProviderNameHint: Labels the login button, e.g. "Sign in with VoidAuth". Empty = "Sign in with OIDC".
settings.oidcIssuerHint: Base address of your login provider (Authentik, Keycloak, VoidAuth, ...). Typing the domain and clicking "Detect" is usually enough.
settings.oidcClientIdHint: The identifier weebsync is registered under as an app at your provider.
settings.oidcClientSecretHint: Secret key from that same registration, shown by your provider when creating the app.
settings.oidcRedirectUrlHint: The provider sends you back here after login. Must match the provider's registration exactly.
settings.oidcClaimHint: Name of the token field holding your groups/roles. "groups" for most providers.
settings.oidcAdminValuesHint: Members of these groups become weebsync admins. Empty = admin rights are not managed by the provider.
settings.oidcUserValuesHint: Only members of these (or an admin) group may sign in. Empty = everyone the provider lets through.
settings.oidcAdminHint: Groups are synced with the provider on every login, so rights follow the provider. The last admin is never demoted.
settings.secretSet: set, leave empty to keep, "-" to clear
settings.usersConfirmDelete: Delete user "{{email}}"? All of this user's servers and downloads will be removed.
settings.pushHint: Notifies on finished or failed downloads. On iOS available after "Add to Home Screen".
settings.pushDenied: Notifications are blocked for this site in the browser. Allow them via the icon in the address bar (Firefox: shield/permissions; Chrome: lock → site settings → notifications), then try again. Note: push only works over https:// or localhost, and private windows always block it.
settings.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support Web Push.
settings.oidcMigrationHint: Existing local accounts are linked automatically by email address on first OIDC login.
settings.plexUrlHint: Address of your Plex Media Server, e.g. https://plex.example.com.
settings.plexTokenHint: Your server's X-Plex-Token, findable via the Plex web UI (XML view of any item).
settings.plexSectionsHint: No selection = all show and movie libraries. Per library: AniList (anime) or TMDB (live action, API key required). Libraries with "anime" in the name preselect AniList.
settings.tmdbApiKeyHint: Free key from themoviedb.org (settings, API). Without a key the series/movies mark stays disabled.
settings.anilistClientHint: API client from anilist.co (settings, developer). The redirect URL must match exactly there; empty = derived from the address.
settings.anilistNotConfigured: Save client ID and secret first.
settings.trustedNetworksHint: CIDRs or IPs (comma-separated) that bypass the login rate limit — e.g. your home network. Do not add public ranges.
settings.rateLimitHint: IPs with failed login attempts. Unblock throttled IPs here immediately.
settings.emailHint: SMTP server for verification and notification emails. Without it, local accounts are created without email confirmation.
settings.smtpFromHint: Sender address (envelope from) — must be a real email address, e.g. no-reply@your-domain. A bare name gets rewritten by relays and flagged as spam. Empty = username.
settings.emailNotConfigured: No SMTP server configured. An admin must set up SMTP first.

jobs.hint: Background jobs, caches and index health. Refreshes every 5 seconds.
jobs.confirmFlush: Flush the "{{scope}}" cache? Entries are re-fetched on demand.
jobs.confirmFlushIndex: Flush the index for "{{name}}"? The crawler rebuilds it gradually.
jobs.indexHint: After a flush the index rebuilds gradually — the crawler runs every {{min}} min.
jobs.confirmRematchAll: Re-search all automatic matches on "{{name}}"? Manual assignments are kept.
jobs.confirmDeleteMatch: Delete the match for "{{name}}"? The folder is re-matched automatically later.

settings.rolesManagedByOidc: Admin roles are managed by your OIDC provider and cannot be changed here.
settings.apiTokenHint: Machine token for the read-only status API and watch triggers (e.g. Home Assistant). Sent as "Authorization: Bearer <token>".
settings.apiTokenConfirmRevoke: Revoke the API token? Integrations using it will stop working.
settings.apiTokenShowOnce: Token (shown only once — copy it now)
settings.anilistPinLabel: Or paste an access token (pin flow)
settings.anilistPinGet: Get a token from AniList (opens in a new tab, copy the shown token)
settings.anilistPinHint: Set the AniList app redirect URL to https://anilist.co/api/v2/oauth/pin, authorize, and paste the shown token here.
settings.baseUrlHint: Public address of this WeebSync instance — used for links in emails (verification, dashboard). Empty = derived from the OIDC redirect URL.
settings.tmdbConnectHint: Requires the TMDB API key above.
settings.envLockedHint: Set via environment variable – not editable here

servers.title: SERVERS
servers.name: Name
servers.validation: Name, protocol (sftp|ftps|ftp), host, username, password required
servers.hostKeyChanged: The server's SSH host key has changed. Only trust it if the change is expected (e.g. server reinstalled) — otherwise this could be a man-in-the-middle attack.

plex.title: PLEX
plex.buildingLong: Matching the Plex library against AniList, the first run takes a few minutes…
plex.notConfigured: Plex is not set up. Add URL and token under <1>Settings</1>.
plex.folderHint: Where the series is stored so far, continue there for consistent storage.
plex.watchHint: Create an auto-sync, prefilled with the Plex folder name and a rename suggestion.
plex.syncHint: One-time download into the Plex folder name under downloads/.

suggestions.title: SUGGESTIONS
suggestions.sub: anilist & tmdb watchlists · plex sequels · trending
suggestions.anilist: AniList: your watchlist on the server
suggestions.notConnected: No AniList account linked. Connect under <1>Settings</1>.
suggestions.anilistEmpty: No watchlist title found in the index. The index grows over time.
suggestions.plusOneHint: Bump the AniList progress by one episode.
suggestions.tmdbNotConfigured: No TMDB API key configured. Add one under <1>Settings</1>.
suggestions.tmdbNotConnected: No TMDB account linked. Connect under <1>Settings</1>.
suggestions.tmdbEmpty: No watchlist title found in the index.
suggestions.trendingEmpty: No trending title found in the index.
